data.title: Pharming Group to participate in April investor conferences
data.description: Pharming revealed its plans to attend two upcoming investor conferences in April 2026, namely the Needham Virtual Healthcare and Kempen Life Sciences Conferences. These events will allow the company’s management to engage with investors and stakeholders.

data.title: NOTICE OF ANNUAL GENERAL MEETING OF JLT MOBILE COMPUTERS
data.description: Shareholders of JLT Mobile Computers AB (publ) are summoned to attend the Annual General Meeting scheduled for May 7, 2026, at 4:00 pm. The meeting will take place at PM & Vänner Hotel located at Västergatan 10 in Växjö, Sweden.

data.title: Givaudan Active Beauty Showcases AI-Powered Ingredient Innovations with Haut.AI at in-cosmetics Global 2026
data.description: In Paris, the top company in the industry has introduced its newest active ingredient breakthroughs, utilizing AI skin analysis and SkinGPT generative simulation. The announcement was made in New York on April 7, 2026 by Givaudan Active Beauty, a key player in premium beauty ingredients. The company has collaborated with Haut.AI, combining their expertise with cutting-edge technology to enhance product development.

data.title: New Research Reveals 60% of Crypto Traders Shifted Platforms in 24 Months as Exchange Loyalty Collapses
data.description: On April 7, 2026, in Singapore, ChainUp, a prominent digital asset technology solutions provider, unveiled the Exchange Operator's Intelligence Report for 2026. The report highlights a notable trend termed as a "silent migration" within the industry, indicating that 60% of the current crypto traders are involved in this shift.
